# Threads Analysis API

> API for querying ~46K Threads posts by @maybe_foucault. Postgres-backed, Tailscale-accessible.

## Base URL
http://100.71.141.45:4323

## Authentication
None required (local network only via Tailscale)

## Response Format
All endpoints return JSON:
- `posts`: array of post objects (for post endpoints)
- `data`: object (for stats/digest endpoints)
- `count`: number of results
- `query`: what was queried
- `generated_at`: ISO timestamp

## Post Object
- id: string — Threads media ID
- text: string — post body (max 500 chars)
- timestamp: ISO string
- ago: string — human-readable relative time ("2 hours ago")
- variety: original | reply | quote | repost
- tags: string[] — topic tags
- primary_tag: string — main tag
- surprise: float — information-theoretic unexpectedness (higher = more unusual)
- word_count: int
- permalink: URL to threads.net
- metrics: { views, likes, replies, reposts, quotes }

## Endpoints

### Time-Based Queries (most useful for "what did I post...")
- GET /posts/now — last 30 minutes
- GET /posts/hour — last hour
- GET /posts/today — today's posts
- GET /posts/week — this week
- GET /posts/month — this month
- GET /posts/since?minutes=N — last N minutes
- GET /posts/between?from=ISO&to=ISO — date range
- GET /posts/latest?n=10 — last N posts

### Search & Discovery
- GET /posts/search?q=term — full-text search
- GET /posts/tag/{tag} — posts by tag
- GET /posts/tag/{tag}/latest?n=5 — latest N in tag
- GET /posts/random — random post
- GET /posts/random/{tag} — random post from tag
- GET /posts/{id} — single post

### Analytics
- GET /stats/overview — totals, date range, posts today/week/month
- GET /stats/streak — consecutive posting days
- GET /stats/top?by=views&n=10 — top posts by metric (views|likes|replies)
- GET /stats/top/today — most engaged today
- GET /stats/hourly — posts per hour today
- GET /stats/daily — posts per day this week
- GET /stats/tags — all tags with counts and percentages
- GET /stats/velocity — posting rate (7d, 30d, 90d averages)

### Social
- GET /social/mentions — top 20 mentioned users
- GET /social/interactions — interaction summary
- GET /social/conversations/{post_id} — reply thread

### Knowledge Graph
- GET /graph/topics — tag clusters
- GET /graph/related/{tag} — related tags

### Digests (great for Apple Intelligence summaries)
- GET /digest/today — structured today summary
- GET /digest/week — weekly summary
- GET /digest/brief — one natural language paragraph of last 24h

## Tags (20 categories)
philosophy, tech, personal, reaction, one-liner, question, media, commentary, finance, meta-social, daily-life, work, food, url-share, sex-gender, race, language, political, creative, shitpost

## Example Queries

"What did I post in the last hour?"
GET /posts/hour

"Show me my philosophy posts from today"
GET /posts/tag/philosophy/latest?n=20

"What's my most liked post?"
GET /stats/top?by=likes&n=1

"Give me a quick summary"
GET /digest/brief

"Search for posts about Foucault"
GET /posts/search?q=foucault

"Who do I talk to the most?"
GET /social/mentions

## Notes
- Data syncs every 30 minutes from Threads API
- Surprise scores: 0-5 = normal, 5-10 = interesting, 10+ = very unusual
- Posts without text (reposts) have text=null
- Metrics available from April 2024 onward
- Swagger UI with try-it-out at /docs
